children.name: alt-text-generator API Contract Harness
00 Core Smoke
Ping
Root Service Index
Health
Swagger UI
Swagger Spec
07 Route Aliases
Versioned ping alias
Versioned health alias
Unversioned scraper alias
Unversioned single description alias
Unversioned page descriptions alias
08 API Auth Contract
Protected description rejects missing auth
Protected description accepts X-API-Key
Protected scraper accepts Bearer token
10 Scraper Contract
Scrape fixture page images
20 Single Description (Azure Stub)
Describe fixture image A
Missing image returns 500
Provider outage returns 500
30 Page Descriptions (Azure Stub)
Describe all images on fixture page
Skips missing images and preserves successful duplicates
Provider outage fails the whole page request
40 Negative Paths
Scraper missing url
Scraper invalid url
Single description missing image_source
Single description invalid image_source
Single description unknown model
Page descriptions missing url
Page descriptions invalid url
Page descriptions unknown model
Unknown route
05 Routing & Redirects
Bare /api redirects to /api/v1/
HTTP redirects to HTTPS
Unit | Scripts | GitHub | Write Newman Summary
parses supported CLI arguments
rejects unsupported CLI arguments
builds an aggregate summary from Newman JSON reports
falls back to request names when collection ids are unavailable
formats a no-failures summary with an explicit none marker
builds a fallback summary when no Newman reports are present
keeps summarizing valid reports when one report is malformed
Unit | Scripts | Run Postman Deploy
parseArgs
uses the production base URL by default
parses the supported base-url flag
rejects unsupported flags
normalizeBaseUrl
strips trailing slashes from the base URL
buildDeployEnvVars
targets the hosted api-docs page for deploy scraper verification
buildDeployNewmanArgs
keeps the deploy JSON and JUnit reporters by default
adds the Allure reporter when a results directory is configured
buildDeployProbeUrls
builds deploy rollout probe URLs from the hosted base URL
hasRequiredRateLimitHeaders
requires the standard rate-limit headers case-insensitively
normalizeBooleanFlag
defaults empty values to false
accepts true and false
rejects unsupported values
resolveProductionDeployAuthConfig
skips protected deploy verification when auth is enabled without a token
runs protected deploy verification when auth is enabled with a token
treats blank deploy validation tokens as missing when auth is enabled
runs protected deploy verification without a token when auth is disabled
requestDeployProbe
parses JSON bodies when the response is JSON
collectDeployStabilizationIssues
reports rollout issues until health headers and auth expectations match
waitForStableDeploy
requires consecutive stable probes before continuing
times out with the last rollout issues when the deploy never stabilizes
Unit | Controllers | Description Controller
DescriptionController.describe
forwards a validation error when image_source is missing
forwards a validation error when model is missing
forwards a validation error for an invalid image_source URL
forwards a validation error for an unknown model
returns the description array on success
forwards an internal error when the describer fails
DescriptionController.describePage
forwards a validation error when url is missing
forwards a validation error when url is invalid
forwards a validation error for an unknown model
returns ordered descriptions on success
forwards an internal error when page orchestration fails
Unit | Config | Swagger
uses only the development Swagger server outside production
uses only the production Swagger server in production
publishes runnable encoded examples for image and page endpoints
publishes reusable auth schemes and protects non-health endpoints
documents a public root service index
prefers the generated OpenAPI artifact over runtime swagger-jsdoc parsing
falls back to runtime generation when the generated spec artifact is missing
Unit | Utils | Validate Env Vars
accepts a Replicate-only provider configuration
accepts an Azure-only provider configuration
rejects startup when no provider is configured
accepts TLS_* credentials in production
requires production TLS credentials when TLS_* is missing
accepts a non-negative TRUST_PROXY_HOPS override
accepts valid cluster lifecycle overrides
accepts multi-worker startup when Redis-backed rate limiting is configured
accepts multi-worker startup when the future unit-local Redis flag is enabled
rejects a negative TRUST_PROXY_HOPS override
rejects a max restart backoff smaller than the base restart backoff
rejects Redis-backed rate limiting without a Redis URL
rejects multi-worker startup without a shared Redis-backed store
accepts Azure provider credentials when endpoint and subscription key are set
rejects an Azure endpoint without credentials
rejects Azure credentials without an endpoint
accepts non-empty API auth tokens when provided
rejects API auth tokens when the configured list is empty after trimming
rejects API auth enablement without any configured tokens
accepts explicitly disabled API auth without configured tokens
Unit | Allure History Policy
normalizes URLs and parses CLI arguments
builds the GitHub Pages report URL for public GitHub repositories
returns no GitHub Pages URL for non-public GitHub hosts
reads the GitHub event payload from disk
rejects unsupported workflow kinds
recognizes same-repository pull requests
resolves the main CI history stream for pushes to main
resolves per-PR history for same-repository pull requests
disables history persistence for fork pull requests
does not persist branch CI history on production pushes
persists deploy-production history on production pushes
keeps manual deploy verification runs ephemeral unless explicitly persisted
allows canonical manual deploy verification runs to persist when requested
disables history for custom deploy verification URLs
Unit | Allure History Artifact Restore
parses the required CLI arguments
rejects missing required CLI arguments
selects the newest eligible artifact and excludes the current run
collects paginated artifact results from the GitHub API
skips restoration when the GitHub token or repository context is missing
treats a cold-start stream as a non-fatal skip
copies the latest valid history artifact into the results directory
rejects artifacts with mismatched manifests without failing the build
Unit | Infrastructure | Logger
uses process-stream logging in production without touching the filesystem
creates the request logger from the app logger child with standard serializers
sanitizes serialized errors before they reach the logger output
prefers existing request ids before generating a new one
maps request outcomes to the expected log levels and messages
Unit | Services | Azure Describer Service
returns joined captions as description
calls the API with correct url, data, and headers
propagates errors from the HTTP client
throws a descriptive error when Azure returns no captions
filters unsupported sources before they reach Azure
rejects unsupported image content types before calling Azure
marks image-source download failures as skippable for page descriptions
does not mark Azure auth failures as skippable
Unit | Config | Index
uses the documented defaults when optional env vars are unset
parses numeric overrides for worker and scraper controls
uses the explicit TLS_* settings for HTTPS config
allows auth tokens to stay configured while auth is explicitly disabled
allows the shared REDIS_URL to back rate limiting automatically
defaults unit-local Redis to localhost when the topology flag is enabled
Unit | Services | Page Description Service
preserves duplicate image entries while deduping provider work
filters model-incompatible image sources before describing a page
skips image-specific provider failures during page descriptions
still fails page descriptions on non-skippable provider errors
Integration | API
request filter
redirects direct HTTP traffic to HTTPS
redirects proxy-forwarded HTTP traffic to HTTPS
redirects /api/ to the versioned route for secure requests
GET /api/ping
responds with pong and mounts the request logger middleware
stays available while the instance is draining
GET /
responds with a stable public service index
GET /api/health
responds with health info
returns 503 while the instance is draining
rate limiting
keeps health checks available when the default API limiter is exhausted
applies the dedicated status limiter to repeated health checks
continues to rate limit normal API traffic
fails open when the Redis-backed limiter store errors during a request
GET /api/scraper/images
returns 400 when url is missing
returns image list on success
returns 500 on scraper failure
GET /api/accessibility/description
returns 400 when image_source is missing
returns 400 for an unknown model
returns description array on success
serves Azure descriptions through the default runtime composition when configured
GET /api/accessibility/descriptions
returns 400 when url is missing
preserves duplicate entries while reusing one prediction per unique URL
returns partial page descriptions when image-specific Azure failures are skippable
unknown routes
returns 404 for unregistered paths
API access control
allows public health endpoints without authentication
keeps the root service index public without authentication
rejects protected endpoints without authentication
accepts X-API-Key authentication on protected endpoints
accepts Bearer authentication on protected endpoints
rejects protected endpoints when the token is not in API_AUTH_TOKENS
allows protected endpoints through when auth is explicitly disabled
Unit | Application Composition
builds the default services when overrides are not supplied
falls back to the default loggers and replicate client
registers only azure when Replicate is not configured
falls back to the default trust proxy setting when config omits proxy
does not register azure when its config is incomplete
does not register clip when the Replicate token is missing
Unit | Scripts | Postman | Collection Utils
lists the top-level folder names from a collection
throws a helpful error when requested folders are missing
maps nested request ids and names back to their top-level folder
lists request items across nested folders
detects exact status assertions in request test scripts
detects exact status-code headers on request items
treats either a header or an exact assertion as a specific status expectation
throws when request items are missing a specific status expectation
enforces specific status expectations across the committed Postman collection
Unit | Scripts | GitHub | Promote To Production
parseArgs
parses supported CLI arguments including required checks
rejects unsupported flags
resolveRequiredChecks
prefers explicitly provided required checks
ensureRequiredChecksGreen
accepts successful required checks even when duplicate runs exist
throws when a required check is missing success
derivePromotionPlan
returns no-op when both branches already share the same tip SHA
uses a fast-forward update when target has no unique commits
uses a force realignment when only branch-only history differs
realigns when both branches diverge but production must track main exactly
isProtectedBranchRefUpdateError
recognizes protected-branch ref update rejections
ignores unrelated GitHub API failures
Unit | Server | Cluster Manager
resolves the documented cluster policy defaults
caps exponential restart backoff at the configured maximum
forks the requested number of workers and restarts unexpected exits with backoff
does not restart workers that exit intentionally
exits the primary when the crash budget is exhausted
shuts down the primary on SIGTERM without scheduling restarts
Integration | Redis Rate Limiting
shares API rate-limit counters across distinct app instances
keeps API and status buckets separate while sharing each scope across instances
Unit | Infrastructure | Rate Limit Store
builds prefixed Redis store namespaces per limiter scope
returns a no-op provider for in-memory rate limiting
connects Redis-backed providers, creates scoped stores, and closes the client
wraps store operations so request-time store errors fail open
fails fast when Redis mode is selected without a Redis URL
Unit | Allure History Fetcher
normalizes the report URL and builds history file URLs
parses CLI arguments with defaults
rejects invalid timeout values
fetches and validates a history file
treats 404 history files as missing instead of failing the build
warns and continues when a history file is invalid
restores the published history files into the results directory
Unit | Services | Scraper Service
ScraperService.isImage
isImage(https://example.com/photo.jpg) === true
isImage(https://example.com/photo.jpeg) === true
isImage(https://example.com/photo.png) === true
isImage(https://example.com/photo.gif) === true
isImage(https://example.com/photo.svg) === true
isImage(https://example.com/photo.webp) === true
isImage(https://example.com/photo.bmp) === true
isImage(https://example.com/photo.jpg?v=123) === true
isImage(https://example.com/page.html) === false
isImage(https://example.com/script.js) === false
isImage(https://example.com/noextension) === false
isImage() === false
ScraperService.extractImageSources
extracts absolute image src attributes
resolves relative image paths to absolute URLs
prefers data-src over src for lazy-loaded images
strips query strings from image URLs
returns empty array when no images found
skips invalid image URLs that cannot be resolved
ScraperService.getImages
returns image sources on success
throws when the HTTP client rejects
Unit | Allure History Artifact Packaging
parses the required CLI arguments
builds a manifest with stream-specific metadata
includes optional PR, Newman mode, and base URL fields when present
rejects missing required CLI arguments
copies the generated history directory and manifest into the artifact output
Unit | Allure Metadata Writer
parses the required results directory argument
builds environment properties from the current runtime and CI env
builds GitHub-flavored executor metadata when workflow env is present
writes environment.properties and executor.json into the results directory
serializes Java properties safely
Unit | Server | Server Functions
configures created HTTP servers with conservative timeout defaults
starts servers and resolves when the listen callback fires
closes all registered servers and closes idle connections first
shuts servers down gracefully on SIGTERM and exits with code 0
escalates shutdown failures to exit code 1
Unit | Middleware | Access Control
treats docs and health endpoints as public
extracts tokens from X-API-Key first
extracts tokens from Bearer authorization
allows requests through when auth is not configured
allows public requests through when auth is configured
rejects protected requests without a valid token
allows protected requests with a matching token
rejects protected requests with an invalid configured header token
allows protected requests through when auth is explicitly disabled
throws when auth is enabled without any configured tokens
Unit | Infrastructure | Load TLS Credentials
generates self-signed localhost credentials outside production
loads configured certificate files when paths are provided
uses inline PEM values when they are provided
uses base64-encoded PEM values when they are provided
throws a helpful error when production credentials are missing
throws a helpful error when a configured certificate path is invalid
Unit | Middleware | Request Filter
redirects direct HTTP requests to HTTPS using the validated host header
redirects forwarded HTTP requests using the validated forwarded host
rejects malformed forwarded host headers instead of constructing a redirect target
rejects malformed direct host headers instead of redirecting
normalizes the bare /api/ route with a relative redirect
passes secure requests through so endpoint validation can handle query semantics
Unit | Scripts | Postman | Live Provider Scope
normalizeProviderScope
falls back to auto when the value is empty
normalizes case and whitespace
rejects unsupported scope values
detectAvailableProviders
detects replicate and azure independently
requires both azure endpoint and credential
resolveProviderScope
prefers azure in auto mode when both providers are available
uses the configured scope when the manual input is auto
uses replicate when auto is the only configured provider
rejects azure scope without azure credentials
rejects all scope when only one provider is configured
getSelectedProviders
maps all to both providers
maps azure to azure only
getSelectedProviderFolders
maps the all scope to every live provider folder
Unit | Server | Runtime Bootstrap
derives worker count and cluster mode from config
writes the pid file only from the primary process
starts single-process runtime when worker count is one
starts clustered mode only from the primary process
logs and exits when runtime bootstrap fails
Unit | Config | Provider Catalog
builds provider config sections with documented defaults and explicit overrides
builds the provider env schema and detects configured providers
validates provider-specific env rules and exposes live-provider metadata
Unit | Controllers | Scraper Controller
forwards a validation error when url is missing
forwards a validation error for an invalid URL
returns scraped images on success
forwards an internal error when the scraper service fails
Unit | Config | Rate Limit Store
defaults to auto mode with in-memory storage when no Redis URL is configured
prefers RATE_LIMIT_REDIS_URL and normalizes the prefix
allows Redis to be disabled explicitly even when REDIS_URL is present
supports a future unit-local Redis topology behind an explicit flag
resolves the effective kind from the configured mode and Redis URL
Unit | Services | Replicate Describer Service
returns description and imageUrl on success
propagates errors from the Replicate client
Unit | Scripts | GitHub | Resolve Live Provider Scope
resolveScopeFromEnv
respects an explicit manual scope override
uses the configured environment scope when the manual input is auto
falls back to azure when auto is requested and both providers are configured
appendGitHubEnv
writes key/value pairs to the provided file
appendSummary
writes markdown lines to the summary file
Unit | Middleware | Error Handler
wraps async handlers and forwards rejected promises
converts the 404 fallback into a not-found ApiError
serializes ApiError instances with request metadata
normalizes unexpected errors into a generic internal response
Unit | Utils | Get Upstream Error Summary
extracts request and response details from fetch-style errors
extracts axios-style config, code, headers, and body preview
returns undefined when no upstream details are available
Unit | Server | Start Application Runtime
starts both servers and registers graceful shutdown
cleans up fatal handlers when bootstrap fails before servers are ready
Unit | Server | Register Fatal Handlers
normalizes non-error unhandled rejections into structured fatal logs
routes fatal exceptions through the active shutdown handler
exits immediately when no shutdown handler is available
Unit | Infrastructure | Outbound Trust
returns undefined values when no CA bundle is configured
resolves relative bundle paths from the current working directory
creates outbound clients that use the configured CA bundle
throws a clear error when the configured CA bundle file does not exist
Unit | Postman Harness Reporting
keeps the existing CLI, JSON, and JUnit reporters by default
adds the Allure reporter when a results directory is configured
resolves and trims the Allure results directory from the environment
Unit | Jest Configuration
keeps the standard node environment when Allure is disabled
switches to the Allure test environment when a results dir is provided
Unit | Providers | Runtime Registry
throws when a configured provider is missing a runtime builder
Unit | Services | Image Describer Factory
returns a registered describer by name
supports chained registration
throws a descriptive error for an unknown model
lists available models
returns empty array when no models registered
Unit | URL Validator
returns true for a valid http URL
returns true for a valid https URL
returns false for a plain string
returns false for an empty string
returns false for undefined
returns false for a relative path
Unit | Utils | Create Router
loads the swagger spec lazily and caches the UI middleware
Unit | Server | Runtime State
starts not ready by default
transitions to ready and then draining
